page_content:
Formerly: LING889A.

LING879 Seminar in Semantics (3 Credits) Current topics in research in semantics. Prerequisite: LING660 or LING661. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs. Formerly: LING889.

LING888 Doctoral Research Paper (1-6 Credits)

Students will strengthen their abilities to formulate coherent research questions, conduct research and create a publishable piece of work. In addition, the course is part of a set of requirements to advance to doctoral candidacy.
